verification.node4_gui_tests: passed after test harness checkbox-state correction

known_platform_issues: AgentFlow currently executes each node in an isolated temporary node_dir and deletes the run workspace at completion; generated files are not persisted as first-class artifacts, only output text and tool events remain.
Upstream artifacts are summarized as text, not materialized into downstream node workspaces; downstream nodes sometimes recreate files from summaries instead of using exact upstream files.
QualityGate passes on non-empty text output and does not enforce expected generated files or successful validation commands by default.
Node duration_ms is recorded as 0 in async execution path.
The test node was assigned profile doc, so it behaved like documentation/reconstruction rather than a strict verifier.
